BLOCKER_fixed_hours_not_enforced: loader enforces per-subject cap at WHOLE-RECORDING granularity -> at high N the tiny cap (0.05h) < one recording -> actual total hours BALLOONS (N=32:116h, N=1024:305h, N=2000:597h != 100h) -> 'fixed-hours' axis silently confounded with TOTAL hours. MUST FIX: window-level budget truncation (cap_windows=cap*120, truncate within recording).
MAJOR_sparse_exposure: N=2000 -> ~6 windows/subject (3 min); N=1024 -> ~12; likely too little for from-scratch encoder to learn per-subject structure -> high-N cells may be under-trained artifacts not diversity effects. Needs pretraining-convergence check per cell + possibly cap the high-N end.
compute_budget_ok: 15 runs from-scratch @100h corpus (pilot-scale); epochs TBD by convergence check
launch_note: BLOCKERS_PRESENT (v2 red-team). Two-budget ALGEBRA sound + identifiable + feasible, BUT (a) loader does not implement the pool/nesting/common-val design (I over-claimed cond 2&8), (b) the crossed exposure axis is internally inconsistent for a frozen encoder [BL-5 PM decision], (c) pooled slope population-confounded, (d) near-singular/low-power [MJ-6 PM decision]. Salvageable primary claim is NARROWER: 3 within-pool matched-exposure diversity differences, descriptive, single SHU-MI target. RETURN TO PM for BL-5 + MJ-6; then I rewrite loader + re-verify + re-red-team.
loader_fixed_hours_bug: FIXED (window-level budget; verified total ~100h all N; was 116-597h)
pm_decision_2026_07_08: BL-1 fix = TWO fixed-H0 lines (100h+200h) lean crossed grid; keep diversity question; NOT reframe; N=32 out of primary; constant-exposure arm = P2 diagnostic only

verification_real_19common_corpus.population_confound_quantified: deep-exposure pool 713 clinical(median 4 rec) vs sparse ~6500 general(median 1 rec) -> exposure axis structurally entangled with clinical population; diversity contrasts within-pool clean

resolutions.MJ1: RESOLVED+disclosed structural confound; N=32 out; nested common pools

launch_conditions.2_common_eligibility_pools_defined: NOT MET - loader does independent choice per cell, no common pool/nesting (BL-4)
launch_conditions.3_whole_window_truncation_verified: PARTIAL - window budget fixed, but eligibility on summed-hours not floored-windows (MJ-8) can fail Gini gate
launch_conditions.4_sampling_balance_thresholds_frozen: thresholds frozen; NOT verified against real loader yet (BL-4/MJ-8)
launch_conditions.5_convergence_task_gate_frozen: MET (spec); positive-control floor may be too weak (MJ-6b)
launch_conditions.6_design_matrix_full_rank: MET but VIF=6.36 (SE x2.52), near-singular, low power (MJ-6)
launch_conditions.8_pretrain_val_subject_disjoint_fixed_co: NOT MET - loader uses per-cell 15% split, no fixed common external val (BL-4)

pending_before_launch: fresh design red-team of revised two-H0 protocol
v2_red_team: agent a744a1d5: BLOCKERS_PRESENT (algebra sound; loader != design; crossed slope unsound). go/no-go had OVER-CLAIMED conditions 2&8.

open_blockers.BL4_loader_gap: rewrite loader (pool_min_h, nested parent_subjects, fixed common val, subset_seed!=init_seed, floored-window eligibility); re-verify balance. I FIX after scope set.
open_blockers.BL5_dual_pool_PM_DECISION: a cell can't be in two pools; frozen encoder can't be restricted post-hoc. PM: (i) retrain exposure arms from common pool ~+4 runs KEEP exposure axis, or (ii) DROP exposure coeff+crossed regression, keep 3 within-pool diversity pairs only.
open_blockers.BL6_pooled_slope_confounded: primary = 3 within-pool diversity diffs reported SEPARATELY w/ population labels; pooled slope NOT primary. I FIX (analysis spec).
open_blockers.MJ6_power_PM_DECISION: VIF 6.36, MDE<seed-SD. PM: (i) add off-diagonal cells/3rd budget cut VIF (more compute), or (ii) declare slopes DESCRIPTIVE + leave-one-N-out sign-stability as go/no-go.
open_blockers.MJ7_log_e_confounded: relabel budget-depth; report effective decorrelated windows/subj. I FIX.
open_blockers.MJ8_eligibility_floored_windows: eligibility on sum(n_timepoints//6000)>=cap_windows. I FIX in loader.

pm_decisions_required: MJ-6 power (add cells vs descriptive slopes)
